package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for bytes_index_any_not_minus_one_contains_any: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.IndexAny(...) != -1` presence checks instead of `bytes.ContainsAny(...)`.
type CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyModel
}

type CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAny(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAnyDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_index_any_not_minus"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    _ = bytes.Contains(buf, []byte(":"))
    bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "index": 2, "any": 3, "not": 4, "minus": 5, "one": 6}
    bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_negative_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_negative_0
    index_negative_1 := bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["index"] + len(input)
    _ = index_negative_1
    any_negative_2 := bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["any"] + len(input)
    _ = any_negative_2
    not_negative_3 := bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["not"] + len(input)
    _ = not_negative_3
    minus_negative_4 := bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["minus"] + len(input)
    _ = minus_negative_4
    one_negative_5 := bytes_index_any_not_minus_negative["one"] + len(input)
    _ = one_negative_5
    return nil
}
